title: Operationalization (GSM v1)
description: Traced governance lineage path through the PPR specificity gradient (Principle → Policy → Rule).

principle.description: Principle at the identity-level root (null = governance gap).

policy.description: Policy translating the Principle into a measurable boundary (null = gap or direct link).

rule.description: Rule operationalizing the Policy as behavioral logic (null = not yet operationalized).
